title: 🔥 May Vibes Only – Special Deals Inside! 🌷
bodyHtml:
🌸 1. Limited-Time Shipping Discount – Sitewide! 🌼


📅 Event Period: May 8 – May 14 23:59 (Beijing Time)


🚚 LitBuy offers a 10% shipping subsidy on all products! Search your favorite items and see if they qualify! Shipping discounts stack and automatically apply when paying for shipping. 🌷


📌 How It Works:

1️⃣ Search for your desired products and check for discounts.

2️⃣ See the exact shipping subsidy amount on the product page.

3️⃣ The subsidy is automatically applied at checkout.


🕒 Shipping subsidies expire on June 30, 2026.


🌷 2. ¥1300 Coupon Pack + 10% OFF Shipping – Limited-Time! 🌸


🌼 Code: KAKOMAY


Enjoy double savings this May— grab your coupon pack and get an extra 10% OFF shipping (no minimum spend!) ✈️🌿

📅 Duration: May8 – May31 (Beijing Time)


🎁 What’s inside?


• ✈️ 1 × 10% OFF Shipping Coupon (no threshold shipping)

• 🌷 1 × 300 RMB coupon for shipping over 2000 YUAN

• 🌼 1 × 200 RMB coupon for shipping over 1500 YUAN

• 🌸 1 × 150 RMB coupon for shipping over 1000 YUAN

• 🍃 2 × 100 RMB coupons for shipping over 800 YUAN

• 🌷 3 × 80 RMB coupons for shipping over 500 YUAN

• 🌼 3 × 50 RMB coupons for shipping over 300 YUAN

• 🌸 2 × 30 RMB coupons for shipping over 21 YUAN


✨ How to Redeem: Go to User Center → Coupons → Redeem



🌼 3. Product Discounts – Extra 1% Off Everything! 🌷


📅 Event Period: May 9 – May 10 (GMT+8)


🛍️ All products enjoy at least 1% discount, with some offering even higher savings! Don’t miss out! 🌸


⚠️ Important Notes:

✔️ Orders placed & paid during the event qualify for discounts.

✔️ Shipping discounts cover up to 10% of your package’s shipping fee and can be stacked with coupons & promo codes.


🌸 Event 4 |  May Referral Reward Program 🌷✨

📅 Event Period: May  12 – May 31 (Beijing Time)


Invite your friends this May and earn festive rewards when they make their Cumulative Top-Up of ¥100 or More! 🌼💸


✅ Valid Referral:  Friend's Cumulative Top-Up ≥ ¥100


💰 Reward Tiers:

• Invite 1 Friend → ¥50

• Invite 5 Friends → ¥200

• Invite 10 Friends → ¥500

• Invite 30 Friends → ¥1,000

• Invite 50 Friends → ¥2,000


📍 Click here to join the event: User Center → Activity Center (open invite hub ↗)


🎁 The more friends you invite, the more May rewards you earn — share the joy and unlock festive bonuses!• 🌸✨



🌷 Event 5 | May Referral Leaderboard Challenge 🌼


📅 Event Period: May 12 – May 31 (Beijing Time)


Each friend who completes a Cumulative top-up of ¥100 or more counts toward the leaderboard.

The Top 10 referrers will receive generous Maycash rewards! 🌸✨


🏁 Leaderboard Rewards:

1️⃣ ¥3,000

2️⃣ ¥2,000

3️⃣ ¥1,000

4️⃣ ¥800

5️⃣ ¥600

6️⃣ ¥500

7️⃣ ¥400

8️⃣ ¥300

9️⃣ ¥200

🔟 ¥100


📍 Click here to join the event: User Center → Activity Center (open invite hub ↗)


🌷 Invite more, climb higher, and win big this May season!• 🌼✨



 ⚠️ Rules & Disclaimer


1️⃣ 💳 Rewards are credited to your account and can only be used for purchases on LitBuy (not withdrawable).

2️⃣ 🤝 Any fake referrals, multiple accounts, proxy top-ups, or abusive behavior will result in disqualification and reward removal.

3️⃣ 👥 Partnered KOL accounts are not eligible for this event.

4️⃣ 🛡️ LitBuy reserves the final right of interpretation of all event rules.


🌸 Invite More, Earn More, and Win Bigger! 🌷




🌸 Happy Shopping! 🌷

LitBuy Team
